message:
fix(python): preserve graph mode in multigraph-to-simple converters

Replace hardcoded Graph::strict() / DiGraph::strict() with
Graph::new(mg.mode()) / DiGraph::new(mdg.mode()) in three Python
binding helper functions:

- multigraph_to_weighted_simple_graph: preserves MultiGraph mode
- multidigraph_to_simple_digraph: preserves MultiDiGraph mode
- multidigraph_to_weighted_simple_digraph: preserves MultiDiGraph mode

This continues the mode-propagation fix series ensuring hardened-mode
graphs don't silently downgrade to strict when passed through algorithm
helpers in the Python layer.

Also includes beads issue database resync (reformatted JSONL).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
